title: Improver review-queue own-port view + live apply/reject/conflict round-trips + autonomy

tests.cmd: npx vitest run tests/improver-apply.test.ts tests/improver-server.test.ts tests/improver.test.ts
tests.summary: 22 passed. improver-apply.test.ts (7): apply-core writes the target via the never-clobber baselineSha contract and runs the REAL reconcile('post-authoring') scoped to tmp dirs (improver-apply-ok); idempotent re-apply; a concurrent edit between plan+apply → 409 conflict → applyWithRetry re-reads + re-diffs and applies on top, preserving the human edit (improver-conflict-ok); reject never writes the target (improver-reject-ok); autonomy direct/promotion/demotion through the review-queue layer. improver-server.test.ts (4): the own-port server live over HTTP — run-now → pending proposal (improver-proposal-ok); Approve → apply + reconcile marker + applied-with-evidence (improver-apply-ok); Reject → rejected, target byte-identical (improver-reject-ok); a rule set auto applies at run-now with no streak (autonomy-direct-ok). improver.test.ts (11, MR5a/b) unchanged.

e2e.summary: 3 passed (desktop/tablet/mobile). The review view: Run-now → a pending memory-consolidation card → Approve → status `applied` + evidence line → Reject a pre-seeded proposal → `rejected` → Autonomy tab shows the rule with `accepted 1`. Screenshot at docs/autothing/evidence/improver-review-view.png.

by: card idiom from model-router view; no emoji; status badges; diff viewer
designAudit.notes: 3-viewport e2e clean; dark theme consistent with router view

notes: New: apply-core.mjs (shaOf/readTarget/buildNewContent/planApply/applyPlan/applyWithRetry — the never-clobber authoring contract mirroring src/lib/claude-md.ts, with a beforeApply seam to exercise the 409 recovery); review-queue.mjs (queue persistence + status transitions + per-rule autonomy via improver-core state machine); scripts/server.mjs (own-port :7088 — run-now/queue/apply/reject/autonomy/promote, self-registers ~/.garrison/ui-fittings/improver.json, auto-applies `auto` rules at run-now); ui/ review-queue view (Queue + Autonomy tabs, Approve/Reject, diff viewer, evidence, autonomy toggle + track record + promotion-approve). reconcile genuinely RUNS (apply-core test calls the real reconcile() with tmp claudeHome/storeDir; the server records a reconcile-invoked marker). apm.yml gains own_port + port 7088 + UI build in setup. Satisfies all U3 tokens.
